description: The MedinTux server is running low on disk space. Identify the top 5 patient records consuming the most storage by analyzing the patient files in 'DrTux/FichePatient' and correlating the folder GUIDs with names from the 'DrTuxTest' MySQL database (tables 'IndexNomPrenom' or 'fchpat'). Export a CSV report to '~/high_usage_patients.csv' containing the columns 'Rank', 'PatientName', 'GUID', and 'Size_MB' (rounded to the nearest megabyte), ordered by size with the largest at Rank 1.
